service.name: Gemini 2.5 Pro API
service.description_for_ai: Google most powerful Gemini model. 1M token context window, best reasoning, code and math. Outperforms GPT-4o on many benchmarks. Use when maximum quality needed: complex analysis, large codebase review, long document processing.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Generate with Google flagship model. Best for: 1M token context, code review of entire repos, complex reasoning, long document analysis.

agent_hints.context_window: 1M tokens = ~750K words = entire novel or codebase. Pass entire files without chunking.
agent_hints.vs_flash: gemini-2.5-flash for high volume cheap tasks. gemini-2.5-pro for best quality when it matters.
